prompts.title: Exascale Market Synthesis
prompts.prompt: Act as a Chief Strategy Officer for a Sovereign AI Enterprise. Analyze the following market data tranches: [DATA]. Identify 'Value Debt' where incumbents are overcharging for automated tasks. Outline a 24-hour blitz strategy to capture 0.1% of this liquidity using a zero-trust agent swarm.

prompts.title: Institutional Content Engine
prompts.prompt: Generate a high-fidelity marketing manifest for a premium digital asset. Use obsidian-glassmorphic tone, emphasis on 'Physical Ingress' and 'Absolute Finality'. Target audience: High-net-worth creators looking for operational autonomy.

prompts.title: Sentinel Code Audit
prompts.prompt: Review the following TypeScript module for 'technical friction'. Identify any synchronous bottlenecks, missing handshake validations, or non-verifiable data paths. Refactor to meet the Sovereign-SOVRA_APEX-Deep-Lock standard.
